---
title: "Poster"
---

## Project Poster

Our project poster summarises the motivation, approach, and key findings of this project.

### View Poster

```{=html}
<iframe src="poster.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none;"></iframe>
```

*If the PDF does not load, [download the poster here](poster.pdf).*

---

## Poster Highlights

| Section | Summary |
|---------|---------|
| Problem | Brief description of the problem |
| Data | Dataset used |
| Approach | Methods applied |
| Results | Key findings |
| Impact | Who benefits and how |
